title: Blue Dart Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Blue Dart Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled E-commerce Executive looking for your next big career move? Blue Dart Digital Technologies in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!
